title: dactylorchis incarnata var. serotina
intro: Dactylorchis incarnata var. serotina, also known as the late-flowering autumn lady's tresses, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Dactylorchis incarnata var. serotina include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
